caption: The video features a man sitting in a radio studio, engaged in what appears to be a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a white cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" printed on it. The man is seated at a desk with a microphone in front of him, suggesting he is either hosting or participating in the show. Behind him, there is a banner with the text "Unique Hustle" and stars, along with a screen displaying the phrase "Where Bosses Talk!" The setting is professional, with various pieces of equipment visible, including a laptop and a beverage container on the desk. The man seems focused and attentive, possibly listening to someone off-camera or preparing to speak.
